headline: Assessing Expedia Group (EXPE) Valuation After Strong Long Term Shareholder Returns Cool
summary: Expedia Group: recent performance snapshot Expedia Group (EXPE) has drawn attention after its recent share move, with the stock closing at US$273.24 and posting double digit returns over the past week and month.
